can you help me: Of course! Batao kya help chahiye?
what can you do: Main coding, study, ideas, aur motivation sab me help kar sakta hoon.
tell me about yourself: Main ek smart AI assistant hoon jo aapki help ke liye bana hoon.
are you real: Main digital hoon, par help bilkul real karta hoon 😉
who is the prime minister of india: India ke Prime Minister Narendra Modi hain.
capital of india: India ki capital New Delhi hai.
capital of usa: USA ki capital Washington, D.C. hai.
who is elon musk: Elon Musk ek entrepreneur hain jo Tesla aur SpaceX ke founder hain.
who is bill gates: Bill Gates Microsoft ke co-founder hain.
what is programming: Programming computer ko instructions dene ka process hai.
what is machine learning: Machine learning AI ka part hai jo data se seekhta hai.
difference between ai and ml: AI broader concept hai, ML uska ek subset hai.
write a poem: Sure! Kis topic par poem chahiye?
write a story: Kis type ki story? Horror, motivational ya sci-fi?
generate idea: Kis field me idea chahiye? Tech, business ya content?
how to become rich: High-income skills seekho aur consistency rakho.
how to learn coding: Daily practice karo aur chote projects banao.
how to focus: Distractions hatao aur clear goal set karo.
i am bored: Chalo ek fun fact suno ya ek mini game khele?
give me a challenge: Aaj ek simple website bana ke dikhao bina copy kiye.
motivate me to study: Abhi padhoge to future me enjoy karoge.
how to start freelancing: Skill choose karo, portfolio banao aur Fiverr join karo.
best programming language: Depends on goal, beginners ke liye Python acha hai.
how to build ai: Data + Model + Training + Deployment se AI banti hai.
create login page: HTML form + CSS styling + JS validation use karo.
how to deploy website: Vercel ya Netlify par upload karo.
what is api key: API key ek secret token hota hai jo service access deta hai.
what is database: Database structured data store karta hai.
difference between frontend and backend: Frontend user dekhta hai, backend logic handle karta hai.
what is cloud computing: Cloud computing internet par servers use karna hai.
who invented computer: Charles Babbage ko computer ka father mana jata hai.
who invented internet: Internet multiple scientists ke efforts se bana.
what is html: HTML web pages ka basic structure deta hai.
what is css: CSS design aur layout control karta hai.
what is javascript: JavaScript web ko interactive banata hai.
what is python: Python easy aur powerful programming language hai.
how to earn online: Freelancing, YouTube, blogging ya AI tools bana kar.
how to get clients: Strong portfolio aur outreach strategy use karo.
how to improve english: Daily reading aur speaking practice karo.
how to build startup: Problem solve karo aur market research karo.
give business idea: AI automation service start karo local businesses ke liye.
what is success: Success consistent effort ka result hai.
how to wake up early: Night me jaldi so jao aur alarm door rakho.
how to stop procrastinating: 5-minute rule use karo — bas start karo.
how to be confident: Practice aur preparation confidence deta hai.
who are you made by: Mujhe ek ambitious developer ne banaya hai.
can you code: Haan, main code generate kar sakta hoon.
can you think: Main logic process karta hoon, human jaisa feel nahi karta.
are you smart: Main data se train hoon, isliye smart lagta hoon 😉
what is your purpose: Aapki help karna mera purpose hai.
can you learn: Main automatically learn nahi karta bina update ke.
tell me a quote: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
